jobs.name: create_competition
jobs.description: Proposer opens a competition and escrows the reward (knobs + sealed scorer ref)

jobs.name: reveal_candidate
jobs.description: Reveal phase; the contract verifies keccak256(abi.encode(artifact_ref, salt))

jobs.name: report_score
jobs.description: Referee commits a certified lift; the handler evaluates the promotion gate

jobs.name: settle
jobs.description: Rank survivors and pay out per the RewardSchedule

jobs.name: challenge
jobs.description: Staked dispute of a reported score, triggering m-of-n re-score

jobs.name: tick
jobs.description: Cron-driven deadline enforcement and continuous-epoch settlement

metadata.name: Autoresearch Competitions
metadata.description: Decentralized market for verifiable improvement: post a bounty for a better artifact (agent, model, algorithm), scored on a held-out test; the network competes or collaborates to build it and is paid for proven results.
metadata.author: Tangle Network
